packs.title: Gacha Packs
packs.subtitle: Tune the secret per-card win rates. Customer-facing published odds stay static and are never affected.

editor.title: Win rates
editor.subtitle: Lock a card to pin its win rate; unlocked cards split the remainder evenly. These weights are secret — customers never see them.
editor.flattenWarning: No cards are locked — saving will reset every card to an even {{pct}}%. Lock the cards you want to preserve first.
